action.reasoning: Observation: 4:1 got 0.6739, slightly worse than 3:1 (0.6743). Have 4 iters left and 2.24h. Analysis: 3:1 weighting is the sweet spot. Try 3:1:1 with v4 to see if adding v4 with lower weight helps, or try 5:2 (best 5x, v3 2x) which is similar to 3:1 but slightly different. Decision: Try best,best,best,v3,v4 (3:1:1) since v4 had val 0.853 (highest val_bacc).
